infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Wanderly uses the camera to capture your travel memories.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Wanderly uses your location to tag travel entries with an address.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Wanderly sends a notification when you save a new entry.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Wanderly to access your camera.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Wanderly to access your location.
